ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_file_number" INTEGER /* File number associated with the trial data */,
  "trial_indexes" INTEGER /* Index of the trial data entries */,
  "trial_type" INTEGER /* Type of trial (e.g., training, game) */,
  "freq_sin_values" REAL /* Frequency sine values recorded during the trial */,
  "time_vec" REAL /* Timestamp vector for the trial data points */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* The date when the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* The location where the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the coach or analyst supervising the trial */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the trial in minutes */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team associated with the trial */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_supervisor_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial to which the metrics belong */,
  "volume_left_vec" REAL /* Volume left vector recorded during the trial */,
  "yy" INTEGER /* Year of the trial's data */,
  "pitch_gy" REAL /* Pitch gyroscope measurement */,
  "yaw_gz" REAL /* Yaw gyroscope measurement */,
  "roll_gx" REAL /* Roll gyroscope measurement */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* The heart rate of the player during the trial */,
  "speed" REAL /* The speed of the player during the trial */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* The total distance covered by the player during the trial */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* The average acceleration of the player during the trial */,
  "deceleration" REAL /* The average deceleration of the player during the trial */,
  "jump_height" REAL /* The average jump height of the player during the trial */,
  "ball_touches" INTEGER /* The number of times the player touched the ball during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each positional entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial related to the position data */,
  "y_axis_lr" REAL /* Y-axis movement data (Left-Right) */,
  "z_axis_ud" REAL /* Z-axis movement data (Up-Down) */,
  "x_axis_fb" REAL /* X-axis movement data (Forward-Backward) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp for the positional data */,
  "velocity_x" REAL /* The velocity in the X-axis */,
  "velocity_y" REAL /* The velocity in the Y-axis */,
  "velocity_z" REAL /* The velocity in the Z-axis */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* The acceleration in the X-axis */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* The acceleration in the Y-axis */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* The acceleration in the Z-axis */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the player associated with the positional data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., defender, forward) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "dominant_foot" TEXT /* The dominant foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* A brief history of the player's injuries */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* The current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* The number of years of experience the coach has */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications the coach holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* The name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the stadium */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team manager */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* The primary color of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* The URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_trials" (
  "player_trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-trial association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player participating in the trial */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the player participated in */,
  "trial_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the coach or analyst supervising the player's trial */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* The location where the player's trial was conducted */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the player's performance in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_trials_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_trials_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_trials_trial_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_supervisor_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance analysis */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial for which the analysis is conducted */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being analyzed */,
  "score" REAL /* Score derived from performance metrics */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or remarks about the performance */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the coach conducting the performance analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* The date when the performance analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* The method used for performance analysis (e.g., video analysis, statistical analysis) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* The tool or software used for performance analysis */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* The status of the player at the time of analysis (e.g., active, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_analysis_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovered, ongoing) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* The severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_duration" INTEGER /* The estimated duration of the injury in days */,
  "injury_treatment" TEXT /* The treatment plan for the injury */,
  "injury_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the injury */,
  "injury_reported_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the staff member who reported the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_injury_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("injury_reported_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged into the system */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* The number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account (e.g., active, locked, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_management_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
